query: SELECT drillId, blocks FROM drillPageLayouts WHERE drillId = 'hips-fire-first-tee-drill';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute SELECT drillId, blocks FROM drillPageLayouts WHERE drillId = 'hips-fire-first-tee-drill';

rows.blocks: [{"content": "Hips Fire First Tee Drill", "id": "block-1769625593537-0.5664446571006719", "style": {"fontSize": "24px", "fontWeight": "bold", "textAlign": "left"}, "type": "text"}, {"id": "block-1769625593537-0.8868642093026936", "type": "video", "url": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=APLcwGq3LiI"}, {"content": "Goal", "id": "block-1769625593537-0.7377826958399454", "style": {"fontSize": "24px", "fontWeight": "bold", "textAlign": "left"}, "type": "text"}, {"content": "Develop correct swing sequencing by training the hips to fire first while the hands stay loaded, creating separation, balance, and efficient power.", "id": "block-1769625906325", "style": {"fontSize": "16px", "fontWeight": "normal", "textAlign": "left"}, "type": "text"}, {"content": "Instructions:", "id": "block-1769625593537-0.8217429362800488", "style": {"fontSize": "24px", "fontWeight": "bold", "textAlign": "left"}, "type": "text"}, {"content": "Have the athlete get into their normal stance and move naturally into their load, then pre-initiate the move forward by driving the back knee and hip toward the pitcher while keeping the hands back and the upper body resisting rotation; from this loaded, stretched position, stay stacked and balanced with the nose over the front-foot line, allow the hips to fire first, and swing from there without resetting or re-striding, focusing on maintaining separation as the barrel is released through the ball..", "id": "block-1769626002077", "style": {"fontSize": "16px", "fontWeight": "normal", "textAlign": "left"}, "type": "text"}]
